content.en:
There is no mountain of the underworld.

Ye Tian's copy body comprehended the Immeasurable Dao here, and the realm of the Immeasurable Dao continued to improve.

In the immeasurable space, his immeasurable path progress has been very slow, and he often even falls into a bottleneck.

But here, there are hardly any bottlenecks, and progress is rapid.

Seeing this progress, Ye Tian was very happy.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's immeasurable path gradually approached the realm of perfection.

Before you know it, the ten trillion years of the Primordial Era have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Immeasurable Dao finally ushered in a breakthrough, and his Immeasurable Dao broke through from the Dacheng realm to the consummation realm.

You must know that countless Ninefold Origin Ancestors have dreamed of elevating the Infinite Dao to the Perfection Realm, but they have not succeeded.

Some of the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestors also comprehended the Immeasurable Path to the perfection realm after becoming the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor for a period of time.

One can imagine how terrifying it was for Ye Tian to elevate the Infinite Dao to the consummation realm in such a short period of time.

After the breakthrough of the Infinite Dao, Ye Tian perfected his own small consummation-level immeasurable dao control techniques one by one to the great consummation-level immeasurable dao control techniques.

As a result, his own strength skyrocketed again.

Moreover, not long after the Infinite Dao broke through to the consummation realm, his life level broke through again, reaching the 108 life level.

In addition, his immeasurable will has been tempered over the years, and countless treasures have been consumed, and he has finally refined his immeasurable will to 120 scales.

At this point, he had almost risen to the current extreme in the Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm.

"I'm afraid that my current strength has surpassed the first level of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, and it is even comparable to the weaker Ninefold Primordial Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this point, although he can continue to refine his body and slowly improve his strength, there is no need for that.

If he wants to improve his strength quickly, he must break the shackles and be promoted to the Supreme Nine Ancestors.

And the impact on the Xeon Ninefold Ancestor, it is naturally better to break through in the Nine-Fold Building.

Thereupon.

A copy of Ye Tian's body entered the Supreme Golden Mountain of the Nine-Story Building.

......

The highest mountain of gold.

Ye Tian entered here and used the Eternal Flint to break the shackles of the life level.

Since the nine Supreme Ninefold Ancestors in the Nine-Fold Building were still in retreat, they didn't know that Ye Tian was attacking the Extreme Ninefold Ancestors, otherwise they would have come over a long time ago.

However, several of the Nine-Fold Ancestors of the First Rank of the Nine-Story Building came.

These are the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor, the Absolute Light Dao Ancestor, and the Divine Star Dao Ancestor.

At this time, Shi Chao Dao Ancestor sighed: "Tens of trillions of Origin Domain Era years ago, Endless Dao Ancestor was only an Eightfold Origin Ancestor, I didn't expect that it was such a short thing, he was going to impact the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor, such a breakthrough speed is too fast!"

"Is the Endless Dao Ancestor sure?" said the Absolute Light Dao Ancestor worriedly.

He had also attacked the Xeon Ninefold Ancestor, but failed, so he knew how difficult it was to attack the Xeon Ninefold Ancestor.

"The Endless Dao Ancestor has the Eternal Flint in his hand. Theoretically, the success rate of the Eternal Flint in helping to break the shackles of life is as high as 70%, and if you are not unlucky, you can successfully break it. However, the cultivation time of the Endless Dao Ancestor was too short, and the accumulation was not necessarily enough. Divine Star Dao Ancestor said.

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor said slightly: "I persuaded the Endless Dao Ancestor before, let him stay in the Ninefold Origin Ancestor for thousands of trillions of Origin Realm years, and then stabilize the foundation, so that the success rate will be higher, but he insists on impacting the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm now!"

"The talent of the Endless Dao Ancestor is very high, and the potential is also very high, the success rate should be higher, it's useless for us to worry about it now, let's wait and see here!"

Jueguang Dao Ancestor said.

......

At this time.

Ye Tian was at the top of the Supreme Golden Mountain, integrating the Eternal Flint into his body, and frantically absorbing the energy of the Eternal Flint Stone.

Previously, his life level was too low to make use of the Eternal Flint Stone.

But now, his life level is 108, and he can use the Eternal Firestone.

In fact, Ye Tian did not rely on the Eternal Flint Stone, relying on countless attempts, and there was also hope to break through to the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor.

But now that there is the Eternal Flint Stone, he is too lazy to make countless attempts, and directly uses the Eternal Flint to break through.

With his talent and potential, if he still fails, then no one can break through and succeed.

For the other Ninefold Ancestors, the success rate of using the Eternal Flint Stone Breakthrough was seventy percent, but here he is ten percent!

Rumble!!!

The energy of the Eternal Flint was frantically absorbed by Ye Tian, impacting the shackles of the life level.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tian's life shackles began to relax.

A certain moment.

Click!!

The shackles of life in the underworld were torn apart, and Ye Tian's life level began to break through from 108 to 109.

Of course, the 109 life level is just Ye Tian's statement, in fact, after breaking the shackles, it is no longer the 109 life level.

Whether it is the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor or the Supreme Enhancement Level, this level is called an immeasurable lifeform.

And after Ye Tian broke through, the life level reached the primary level of immeasurable life forms.

At this moment, Ye Tian's body frantically absorbed the energy of the Supreme Golden Mountain.

Soon, the energy of the Supreme Golden Mountain began to decrease by a bit, which immediately attracted the attention of some Dao Ancestors in the Supreme Golden Mountain.

"All Dao Ancestors have left the Supreme Golden Mountain and suspended the breakthrough!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestors and the others shot one by one, and moved one Dao Ancestor after another.

After all, when Ye Tian broke through, all the energy was absorbed by Ye Tian, and even if other Dao Ancestors really wanted to break through, they would definitely fail.

As time passed, the Supreme Mountains began to dim.

To this end, Ye Tian took out a large amount of resources as resources to fill.

At the same time, the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor also took out some of the inventory of the Nine-Story Building and sent it to the Supreme Golden Mountain to help Ye Tian complete the breakthrough.

In this way, after a long time, Ye Tian really stepped into the primary-level immeasurable life form, and his strength underwent a huge transformation, and he leaped into the level of the powerful Supreme Ninefold Ancestor.

After Ye Tian completely broke through, the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor and they appeared.

"Congratulations to the Endless Dao Ancestor for achieving the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Dao Ancestor for achieving the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Dao Ancestor for achieving the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor and they congratulated one after another.

"You're welcome!"

Ye Tian responded.

Immediately, Ye Tian left the Supreme Golden Mountain, came to the Truncated Xuanlou, and began to retreat for a period of time, one is to stabilize the realm, and the other is to use this time to improve the immeasurable will and life level.

In this way, you can also add some more strength.

And not long after, the news that Ye Tian had stepped into becoming the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor spread, shocking countless forces, and even the Primordial Ancient Sea was shocked after knowing about it.
